eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Potter, TX; at 03:23 AM ON MAR 11, 2026 Effective until 04:23 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Amarillo Area Office of Emergency Management: Evacuate immediately from Valle De Oro due to wildfire. This is voluntary and is effective until further notice. Leave now and follow directions from emergency personnel. Roads may be blocked or congested, so plan your route accordingly. Stay informed with local news or official channels. Fire moving towards VDO from the North. Evacute south. Use 385 if possible.
